# defectdojo_endpoint (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Endpoint

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_endpoint" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `fragment` (String) The fragment identifier.
- `host` (String) The host name or IP address.
- `path` (String) The location of the resource.
- `port` (Number) The network port associated with the endpoint.
- `product` (Number) The product this endpoint belongs to.
- `protocol` (String) The communication protocol/scheme such as 'http', 'ftp', 'dns', etc.
- `query` (String) The query string.
- `userinfo` (String) User info as 'alice', 'bob', etc.
